attributes.description: Insider-threat-focused view of Windows LNK (shortcut) files parsed by LECmd (Eric Zimmerman) via KAPE. A LNK in a user's Recent folder is hard evidence that user opened that file. Cross-reference: a target path from the Removable Media panel often correlates with a USBSTOR entry in the Registry dashboard and a shellbag entry in the Shellbags dashboard — those three artifacts together give you 'user X plugged in USB Y, navigated to folder Z, and opened file W'.

attributes.title: LNK Files — Insider Threat
